creatorLens: PDF→markdown with LLM hybrid mode — uses Gemini/Ollama alongside traditional parsing for table merging, inline math, form extraction. This LLM-augmented extraction pattern is novel: neither unstructured nor docling combine LLM reasoning with traditional parsing at extraction time. GPL-3.0 limits adoption but the pattern is transferable.

context.t28Relevance: QS-only. LLM hybrid extraction pattern is novel and relevant to T28 analysis layer. Pattern captured from README.
context.notablePattern: LLM hybrid mode — augmenting traditional extraction with LLM reasoning for edge cases (cross-page tables, form values, inline math)
